name: Term Limit
text:
Each creature an opponent controls that has been on the battlefield longest under that player's control is term-limited and is exiled. (For each player, pick the creature they've controlled the longest; if they can't remember, the table votes, and the table never remembers fondly.)
For each creature exiled this way, you create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token.
flavorText: "You've held that office — sorry, that battlefield position — long enough."

extras.fourthWall: table votes / memory of play order
